name: @flxify/cli
description: Terminal text utility with 111 transformation scripts, Vim keybindings, command palette, and 6 themes
author: Ahmed El Taweel

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "var fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');var src=p.resolve(__dirname,'..','scripts');var dst=p.resolve(__dirname,'scripts');if(!fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.mkdirSync(dst);}fs.readdirSync(src).filter(function(f){return f.endsWith('.js')}).forEach(function(f){fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f))});var libSrc=p.join(src,'lib');var libDst=p.join(dst,'lib');if(!fs.existsSync(libDst)){fs.mkdirSync(libDst);}fs.readdirSync(libSrc).filter(function(f){return f.endsWith('.js')}).forEach(function(f){fs.copyFileSync(p.join(libSrc,f),p.join(libDst,f))});console.log('Copied scripts to tui/scripts/')"
